markdown:
[![Coolify](https://coolify.io/android-launchericon-48-48.png)Coolify](https://coolify.io/) [Philosophy](https://coolify.io/philosophy) [Contributors](https://coolify.io/contributors) [Pricing](https://coolify.io/pricing) [Services](https://coolify.io/services) [Docs](https://coolify.io/docs/) [Merch](https://shop.coollabs.io/?utm_source=coolify) [Sponsor Us](https://coolify.io/sponsorships) [Changelog](https://coolify.io/changelog) [Community (21k+)](https://coollabs.io/discord) [To Cloud](https://app.coolify.io/) [Philosophy](https://coolify.io/philosophy) [Contributors](https://coolify.io/contributors) [Pricing](https://coolify.io/pricing) [Services](https://coolify.io/services) [Docs](https://coolify.io/docs/) [Merch](https://shop.coollabs.io/?utm_source=coolify) [Sponsor Us](https://coolify.io/sponsorships) [Changelog](https://coolify.io/changelog) [Community (20k+)](https://coollabs.io/discord) [To Cloud](https://app.coolify.io/) # Pricing. ## Pricing that adjusts according to your needs. ## Self-hosted Free Forever Deploy Coolify on your infrastructure without any restrictions on features. - Full access to all features - Need your own infrastructure for Coolify - No limitation or restrictions - Community support ((21k+) members) - Automated or Self-managed updates - Includes all upcoming features [Start Self‑hosting](https://coolify.io/docs/get-started/installation) ## Cloud Monthly Annually (save 20%) $5 /month Base price (connect 2 servers) \+ $3 /month per additional server Just connect your servers, Coolify runs on our managed infrastructure. - Connect unlimited servers - Unlimited deployments per server - Free email alerts for Coolify events - Community + limited email support - Founder-tested updates You need to bring your own servers You need to bring your own servers from any cloud provider (such as [Hetzner](https://coolify.io/hetzner), DigitalOcean, AWS, etc.). Your apps will be deployed on the server you connect to the cloud, while Coolify runs on our managed server. (You can connect your RPi, old laptop, or any other device that runs the [supported operating systems](https://coolify.io/docs/get-started/installation#_2-supported-operating-systems).) [Get Started in the Cloud](https://app.coolify.io/register) | Feature | Self-hosted | Cloud | | --- | --- | --- | | Application Deployments | | | | Database Deployments | | | | Service/One-click Deployments | | | | API Access | | | | Codebase | Open source | Open source | | Coolify Hosting | Self-managed | Managed | | Coolify Dashboard Domain | Custom Domain | app.coolify.io | | Coolify Setup | Manual | Managed | | Coolify Backups | Self-managed (but automated) | Managed | | Updates \* Limited to Coolify updates, does not include changes to deployed
resources. | Manual (but automated) | Managed | | Email Alerts \* Other alerts (Discord, Telegram, etc.) are also supported, but
those needs to be configured manually on each type, self-hosted
or cloud. | Manual (requires SMTP/Resend) | Managed | | Teams | Unlimited | Unlimited \* Requires an additional subscription per team. | | Team Members | Unlimited | Unlimited | | Connected Servers | Unlimited | Unlimited | | Any Other Upcoming Features | Unlimited & Free Forever | Included In The Price | ## Frequently Asked Questions Do I get any Cloud‑only features? Does Coolify Cloud back up my application data? Can I import self‑hosted configs into Coolify Cloud? How often is Coolify Cloud backed up? Is Coolify Cloud based on the open‑source version? What happens if I cancel my subscription? What if I miss a payment? Are there IPs to whitelist for Coolify Cloud? Do I need to bring my own servers? Why pay if I provide my own servers? What happens if I exceed my server limit? Is there a trial for Coolify Cloud? Are discounts available? Am I locked into Coolify Cloud? Can I use my own domain for the Cloud dashboard? © 2026 coolLabs Solutions Kft. All rights reserved. [Other Projects](https://coollabs.io/) [Privacy Policy](https://coollabs.io/privacy-policy/) [Terms of Service](https://coollabs.io/terms-of-service) [Refund Policy](https://coollabs.io/refund-policy/) [X](https://x.com/heyandras) [GitHub](https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify) [Discord](https://coollabs.io/discord)

metadata.og:description: Affordable pricing for Coolify Cloud. Self-hosted is free forever. Pay-as-you-grow plans starting at $5/month.
metadata.twitter:title: Coolify
